mapper.select: SELECT sub_cd AS subCd, COALESCE(code_nm ->> #{lang}, code_nm ->> 'ko', sub_cd) AS codeNm FROM om_code_m WHERE main_cd = #{mainCd} AND (code_info ->> 'use_yn') = 'Y' ORDER BY (code_info ->> 'disp_seq')::int ASC NULLS LAST, sub_cd

sql.where:
c.main_cd = 'CODE'
AND ( c.sub_cd ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR COALESCE(c.code_nm ->> 'ko', '') ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR COALESCE(c.code_nm ->> 'en', '') ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )

mapper.select:
SELECT 'MAIN' AS rowType , c.main_cd AS mainCd , c.sub_cd AS subCd , COALESCE(c.code_nm ->> 'ko', '') AS codeNmKo , COALESCE(c.code_nm ->> 'en', '') AS codeNmEn , COALESCE(c.code_info ->> 'use_yn', 'Y') AS useYn , (CASE WHEN trim(COALESCE(c.code_info ->> 'disp_seq', '')) ~ '^[0-9]+$' THEN (c.code_info ->> 'disp_seq')::int END) AS dispSeq , COALESCE(c.code_info ->> 'etc1', '') AS etc1 , COALESCE(c.code_info ->> 'etc2', '') AS etc2 , to_char(c.created_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createdAt FROM om_code_m c
ORDER BY c.created_at DESC , c.sub_cd

SELECT 'DETAIL' AS rowType , c.main_cd AS mainCd , c.sub_cd AS subCd , COALESCE(c.code_nm ->> 'ko', '') AS codeNmKo , COALESCE(c.code_nm ->> 'en', '') AS codeNmEn , COALESCE(c.code_info ->> 'use_yn', 'Y') AS useYn , (CASE WHEN trim(COALESCE(c.code_info ->> 'disp_seq', '')) ~ '^[0-9]+$' THEN (c.code_info ->> 'disp_seq')::int END) AS dispSeq , COALESCE(c.code_info ->> 'etc1', '') AS etc1 , COALESCE(c.code_info ->> 'etc2', '') AS etc2 , to_char(c.created_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createdAt FROM om_code_m c WHERE c.main_cd = #{mainCd} ORDER BY (CASE WHEN trim(COALESCE(c.code_info ->> 'disp_seq', '')) ~ '^[0-9]+$' THEN (c.code_info ->> 'disp_seq')::int END) ASC NULLS LAST , c.sub_cd

SELECT main_cd AS mainCd , sub_cd AS subCd , COALESCE(code_nm::text, '{}') AS codeNm , COALESCE(code_info::text, '{}') AS codeInfo , to_char(created_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createdAt FROM om_code_m WHERE main_cd = #{mainCd} AND sub_cd = #{subCd} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO om_code_m (main_cd, sub_cd, code_nm, code_info, created_by, updated_by) VALUES (#{mainCd}, #{subCd}, #{codeNm}::jsonb, #{codeInfo}::jsonb, #{createdBy}, #{createdBy})
